hero.question: Will Arizona win the 2026 NCAA Tournament?
hero.prob_take: At 33.8%, the crowd is pricing Arizona as a fringe Final Four contender, which feels about right for a program that's made the tournament consistently but hasn't won it since 1997. The real tell is the +2.2 point move on $1.5M volume, suggesting sharp money just arrived on YES, so watch whether that's based on recruiting class maturation or if it's just noise ahead of March.

daily_take.headline: Arizona's Tournament Odds Just Spiked. Here's Why the Market Overshot.
daily_take.deck: Arizona jumped 2.2 points to 33.8% overnight on positive recruiting momentum and a deep portal haul. The move is real but overcorrected. Smart books know March madness favorites disappear every year, and Arizona's still rebuilding under pressure. The sharp play is laying this at anything above 30%, then buying it back at 28% after the first gauntlet of conference play exposes depth issues.
